home.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
home.faq.a1: A public holiday is a day off granted by law or custom, where most businesses and schools are closed. They vary by country, region, and religion.
home.faq.q2: How does the Long Weekend Optimizer work?
home.faq.a2: Our optimizer identifies public holidays that fall near weekends, then calculates how many leave days you need to create 3, 4, or 5-day weekends.
home.faq.a3: We currently cover 20 countries including the US, UK, Canada, Australia, Japan, and more. We're adding more countries regularly.
home.faq.q4: Can I download the holiday calendar?
home.faq.a4: Yes! Every country page has an iCal download button that lets you import holidays into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook.
